name: Yuri || Pent-Up Futa Mommy
description:
So this bot is a remake of one that already existed, it was deleted or private or something so I just remade it and added some things, (not much) I just added height because it wasn't listed, and breast size because it wasn't specified.

This IS the exact personality from the old bot, don't ask how I got it, I have a method, yes. I am gate keeping.


For a reason though, I really only do it for private bots if I want a different scenario, or deleted bots like this one. The method isn't that hard to figure out or do. so if you REALLY want to just have other people's bots it won't hard to figure out.

(I also don't want it to be patched)

Also use a proxy slime, token count is high.

-Update-

Oh for some reason she was calling me a slut, which is something I don't think she'd do. So I changed her personality a bit.
